Name: Average time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and the first subsequent activity in the case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time for Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that are eventually rejected
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Total time for Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that are eventually paid
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants containing a loop back to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Time until Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE is performed after a previous Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE since the Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE Cycle Time in variants without the budget owner approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER does not occur

Name: Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE Cycle Time in variants with the budget owner approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER occurs

Name: Time of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE compared to the average time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Time of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE compared to the average time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled for successful cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE for immediately rejected cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after a Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE event
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'
